loop1.title: Power & Energy (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing active and reactive power, active energy, and apparent power. Reactive energy and projected demand are approximated from available power columns; trend and delta metrics are omitted as they are not directly measured.

loop1.title: Voltage Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live three-phase voltage trends and statistical summaries; threshold lines omitted as the asset's nameplate rating (required for fixed limits) is unknown.

loop1.title: Current Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live current trends and summaries; threshold lines omitted because the asset's nameplate rated_current_a is unknown.
